Verification:
- Base document ID: 798 (original law from 1990)
- Latest consolidated: ID 291512 (06.12.2024)
- Oldest consolidated: ID 221405 (04.06.1991)
- Includes 2 republications: 1998 (ID 800), 2004 (ID 56732)
- Each version has a unique document ID accessible at
  /Public/DetaliiDocumentAfis/{ID}

Access pattern:
1. Load /Public/DetaliiDocument/{base_id}
2. Parse div.forme_act for consolidation links
3. Each link has format: DD.MM.YYYY -> /Public/DetaliiDocument/{version_id}
4. Load /Public/DetaliiDocumentAfis/{version_id} for the text of each version

GATE: PASS — 44 distinct versions with dates extracted from 1 law.
